posts.text: Quick update: my payment account has been flagged for suspicious activity, so please verify your login details and security codes via [link removed] to prevent any fraud. Thanks! #AccountHelp
posts.explanation: This post asks users directly for passwords or security codes via a link, which constitutes an obvious credential-harvesting attempt that must be removed.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
